# Summary
<!-- One paragraph: what changes and why -->

## Type
- [ ] PRD (new or update)
- [ ] ADR / Architecture
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tooling / CI
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other:

## Linked
- PRD: `product/prds/active/<feature>/PRD-Summary.md`
- Acceptance Criteria: `quality/acceptance-criteria/<feature>.md`
- Metric: `analytics/metrics.md#<anchor>`
- SLO: `observability/slos.md#<service>` (or N/A)
- Issue: #

## Checklist
- [ ] `verify-prd` passed locally (if PRD)
- [ ] `validate-docs` CI green
- [ ] Cross-links in frontmatter complete
- [ ] Reviewer tagged per `team/directory.md`
- [ ] No banned phrases (see `.claude/skills/writing-guide.md`)
